hooks.command: printf '{"title":"[%s] %s","message":"Session finished"}' "$DDEV_SITENAME" "${DDEV_TUI_TITLE:-Claude Code}" | curl -s --connect-timeout 1 -X POST http://host.docker.internal:5454/notify -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @-

printf '{"title":"[%s] %s","message":"Needs your attention"}' "$DDEV_SITENAME" "${DDEV_TUI_TITLE:-Claude Code}" | curl -s --connect-timeout 1 -X POST http://host.docker.internal:5454/notify -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d @-
